queries.question: For every sound designer, list the techniques they use.
queries.sql: select sound_designers.name , techniques.methodname from Sound_Designer_Technique join Techniques on Sound_Designer_Technique.TechniqueID = Techniques.ID join Sound_Designers on Sound_Designer_Technique.SoundDesignerID = Sound_Designers.ID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?methodname WHERE {
  ?sound_designer_technique a :Sound_Designer_Technique .
  ?techniques a :Techniques .
  ?sound_designer_technique p:hasTechniques ?techniques .
  ?sound_designers a :Sound_Designers .
  ?sound_designer_technique p:hasSound_Designers ?sound_designers .
  ?sound_designers p:name ?name .
  ?techniques p:MethodName ?methodname .
}

queries.question: Show me the techniques each sound designer uses.
queries.sql: SELECT Techniques.MethodName  from Sound_Designer_Technique join Techniques on Sound_Designer_Technique.TechniqueID = Techniques.ID join Sound_Designers on Sound_Designer_Technique.SoundDesignerID = Sound_Designers.ID   GROUP BY Sound_Designer_Technique.TechniqueID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Sound_Designer_Technique.SoundDesignerID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Sound_Designers)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the techniques each sound designer uses.
